label: no
cot_prefix: Okay, let me try to figure out this square dance problem. So, there are five dancers: Alice, Bob, Claire, Dave, and Eve. Their initial partners are Sam, Izzi, Jamie, Ophelia, and Patrick respectively. Then throughout the song, they switch partners multiple times, and I need to track these swaps to find out who Claire is dancing with at the end. Let me start by listing the initial pairings: - Alice → Sam - Bob → Izzi - Claire → Jamie - Dave → Ophelia - Eve → Patrick Now, the problem states a series of partner switches. Let me go through each step one by one. First switch: Bob and Dave switch partners. So initially, Bob is with Izzi, Dave is with Ophelia. When they switch partners, Bob will be dancing with Ophelia, and Dave will be dancing with Izzi. Let me write that down: After first switch: - Bob → Ophelia - Dave → Izzi Others remain the same for now: - Alice → Sam - Claire → Jamie - Eve → Patrick Second switch: Alice and Eve switch partners. Currently, Alice is with Sam and Eve is with Patrick. After switching, Alice will be with Patrick and Eve will be with Sam. So: After second switch: - Alice → Patrick - Eve → Sam Others: - Bob → Ophelia - Claire → Jamie -
